summary: The implementation successfully covers all 8 requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-8). The backend implements OTP generation, verification, and cost calculation systems. The frontend provides a complete booking flow with OTP verification, trip details input, cost breakdown display, and a transportation-themed UI with warm earth tones. However, the OTP expiration constraint (5 minutes validity) is not implemented, and REQ-4's trip persistence is incomplete.

missing_requirements.requirement: OTP expiration timestamp with 5 minutes validity
missing_requirements.reason: Backend generates OTP but does not store expiration timestamp or enforce 5-minute validity period as specified in constraints and acceptance criteria

missing_requirements.requirement: Trip data persistence and association with booking
missing_requirements.reason: Backend stores trip start/end time and distance fields exist in TripData type, but no implementation of recording actual trip start/end times or persisting completed trip data with these timestamps

hallucinated_features.description: Random distance generation in getDistance() function
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend includes getDistance() function that generates random distance values (0-100 km). This was not requested in any requirement. REQ-6 specifies user input for distance, not backend generation

hallucinated_features.description: Time calculation function getTime() based on distance
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend includes getTime() function that calculates time as distance * 2. This auto-calculation was not requested. REQ-6 specifies user input for time taken, not backend derivation

hallucinated_features.description: Base fare in cost breakdown display
hallucinated_features.reason: Frontend CostBreakdown component displays a $50 base fare that is added to the total. REQ-3 acceptance criteria specifies pricing formula includes base fare, per-kilometer rate, and per-minute rate, but backend getCost() only uses distance and time without base fare
